subcodes.first_line: O Rajab-'Alí! Thy brother, who hath circumambulated the Ka'bih of God, the Lord of what hath been and what shall be, hath made mention of thee. Say: My God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رجب قبل علی قد ذکرک اخوک الذی طاف کعبه الله رب ما کان و ما یکون قل الهی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
